opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: It feels like I am sitting on a golf ball of glass, and it hurts so much to pass urine.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My pelvic pain has flared up badly over a few days, it burns to pee, and tonight it's so bad I can't sleep — I'm worried something's seriously wrong down there.

symptom_narrative.onset: it's been building over about three days, and flared after I overdid it exercising yesterday
symptom_narrative.duration: three days of getting worse, really bad tonight
symptom_narrative.character: a deep aching pressure in the area between my legs, like sitting on something hard and sharp
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: severe tonight — I can't get comfortable sitting or standing
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: deep in the perineum, between the scrotum and back passage
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: there most of the time, worse when I sit
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: standing and pacing eases it a bit
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: it burns when I wee and I'm going more often, but no discharge and no blood that I've seen
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had flares like this before, they told me it was a chronic pelvic pain thing
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can walk around but I can't sit comfortably and I can't sleep with it

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: chronic pelvic pain / prostate-area pain that flares
past_medical_history.how_managed: pain relief and it settles over a week or two

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: taking it regularly but it's not helping

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live on my own and I'm really anxious this could cause permanent damage to my waterworks

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: single reading while in pain and anxious
single home reading — does not exclude developing infection
